commit_message:
docs(closeout): reconcile cognition for cluster POL-394

Run: polaris-run-pol-394-2026-06-26-001
Cluster: POL-394
Children: POL-398, POL-399, POL-400, POL-401
Files updated:
- POLARIS.md: 1 files
- SUMMARY.md: 1 files
- docs ingested: 1
- links repaired: 0

drift_observations.detail: setup-interview/ subsystem not mentioned; new three-step new-repo init flow not documented
Current State section did not reflect new setup interview, approval-gated generation, or checkpoint report capability

polaris_md_updates.change_summary: Added setup-interview/ subsystem to What belongs here; clarified What does not belong in index.ts; added editing rule for the three-step new-repo init flow.

summary_md_updates.change_summary: Updated Current State to describe setup-interview/ subsystem, three-step new-repo flow, and adopt-approve.ts optional markdown/persist extensions. Added setup-interview canonical sources.

docs_ingested.reason: Design spec for implemented behavior in POL-394 children POL-398 through POL-401; all implementation children listed in the doc match completed children.

docs_archived.reason: One-time UX synthesis analysis that decomposed into POL-390 through POL-393. Consumed as design input; no ongoing authority as a spec.

yaml_updates.change_summary: Added kind: spec, status: active, promoted_by: closeout-librarian frontmatter fields on promotion.

evidence_summary: POL-394 delivered a new src/cli/setup-interview/ subsystem (schema, store, runner, generate, report) wired into polaris init for empty/new repos as a three-step flow: interview, approval-gated artifact generation, and checkpoint report. adopt-approve.ts was extended with optional markdown and custom persist callback. src/cli/POLARIS.md was updated to document the new subsystem in What belongs here, clarify the index.ts scope note, and add an editing rule for the three-step flow. src/cli/SUMMARY.md Current State was updated to describe the full new-repo init path and the adopt-approve.ts extensions. The design spec pol-390-new-repo-setup-interview-design.md was promoted from smartdocs/raw/ to smartdocs/specs/active/ with correct frontmatter and a provenance file. The UX synthesis doc pol-389 was recorded as archived (kept in place). src/POLARIS.md and src/SUMMARY.md required no changes. No broken links found. No cognition notes to archive.
